zh.lifeSummary: 當John FitzHerbert於1432年出生在英國德比夏爾諾波利時，他的父親Nicholas FitzHerbert23歲，母親Alice Booth17歲。他於1482年與Margaret de Babington結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1503年12月5日在英國德比夏爾艾特瓦爾享年71歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭德比夏爾艾特瓦爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John FitzHerbert于1432年出生在英国德比夏爾諾波利时，他的父亲Nicholas FitzHerbert23岁，母亲Alice Booth17岁。他于1482年与Margaret de Babington结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1503年12月5日在英国德比夏爾艾特瓦爾享年71岁，埋葬在英国英格兰德比夏爾艾特瓦爾。

nameMeanings.name: FitzHerbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Herbert (see Herbert ), ‘son of Herbert’.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John FitzHerbert was born in 1432, in Norbury, Derbyshire, England, his father, Nicholas FitzHerbert, was 23 and his mother, Alice Booth, was 17. He married Margaret de Babington in 1482. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died on 5 December 1503, in Etwall, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 71, and was buried in Etwall, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John FitzHerbert est né en 1432, à Norbury, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas FitzHerbert, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Alice Booth, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Babington en 1482. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé le 5 décembre 1503, à Etwall, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Etwall, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John FitzHerbert 1432 in Norbury, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas FitzHerbert 23 und seine Mutter Alice Booth 17. Er hat 1482 Margaret de Babington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb am 5. Dezember 1503 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Etwall, Derbyshire, England und wurde in Etwall, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John FitzHerbert è nato il nel 1432 nel Norbury, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Nicholas FitzHerbert, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Alice Booth, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Babington nel 1482. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 5 dicembre 1503, nel Etwall, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Etwall, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John FitzHerbertが1432年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアノーブリーで生まれた時，父Nicholas FitzHerbertは23歳，母Alice Boothは17歳であった。1482年にMargaret de Babingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1503年12月5日にイギリスデルブイシュアイアエトワルで71歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアエトワルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John FitzHerbert(이)가 1432년 영국 더비실르 노르버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas FitzHerbert(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Booth(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1482년 Margaret de Babington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1503년 12월 5일 영국 더비실르 트월에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 트월에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John FitzHerbert nasceu em 1432, em Norbury, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas FitzHerbert, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Alice Booth, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Babington em 1482. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de dezembro de 1503, em Etwall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Etwall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John FitzHerbert родился в 1432 г. в местности норбури, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas FitzHerbert было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Booth, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Babington в 1482 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер 5 декабря 1503 г. в местности этвалл, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности этвалл, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John FitzHerbert nació en 1432, en Norbury, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas FitzHerbert, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Alice Booth, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Margaret de Babington en 1482. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 5 de diciembre de 1503, en Etwall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Etwall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
